phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the Giudecca from San Marco
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva alla Giudecca da San Marco?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah AL-lah joo-DEK-kah dah san MAR-koh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Giudecca is a quiet island separated from the main body of Venice by the Giudecca Canal — the vaporetto takes two minutes.

responses.english: By vaporetto number two, from Zattere.
responses.phonetic: kon eel vah-poh-RET-toh noo-MEH-roh DOO-eh, dah TSAH-teh-reh.
responses.french: Con il vaporetto numero due, da Zattere.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Redentore church is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la Chiesa del Redentore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah KYEH-zah del reh-den-TOH-reh?

responses.english: Along Fondamenta del Redentore, visible from the vaporetto.
responses.phonetic: LOON-goh leh fon-dah-MEN-tah del reh-den-TOH-reh, vee-ZEE-bee-leh dal vah-poh-RET-toh.
responses.french: Lungo le Fondamenta del Redentore, visibile dal vaporetto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get a panoramic view of Venice from the Giudecca
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si vede meglio Venezia dalla Giudecca?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see VEH-deh MEL-lyoh veh-NET-tsyah DAL-lah joo-DEK-kah?

responses.english: From the vaporetto jetty, open view of San Marco.
responses.phonetic: dal pon-TEE-leh del vah-poh-RET-toh, VEES-tah ah-PER-tah soo san MAR-koh.
responses.french: Dal pontile del vaporetto, vista aperta su San Marco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are restaurants on the Giudecca
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, ci sono ristoranti sull'isola della Giudecca?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, chee SOH-noh rees-toh-RAN-tee sool-LEE-zoh-lah DEL-lah joo-DEK-kah?

responses.english: Yes, a few places that are very quiet.
responses.phonetic: see, AL-koo-nee loh-KAH-lee loh-KAH-lee MOL-toh tran-KWEEL-lee.
responses.french: Sì, alcuni locali locali molto tranquilli.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Giudecca is worth visiting for half a day
phrases.text_local: Scusi, vale la pena passare mezza giornata alla Giudecca?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, VAH-leh lah PEH-nah pas-SAH-reh MED-tsah jor-NAH-tah AL-lah joo-DEK-kah?

responses.english: Yes, for the peace and the Grand Canal view.
responses.phonetic: see, per lah KYEH-teh eh lah VEES-tah sool kah-NAH-leh GRAN-deh.
responses.french: Sì, per la quiete e la vista sul Canal Grande.
